meta_title: Removals Hove| Moving Home in Sussex
meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete moving, storage and packing service to clients across East Grinstead and Sussex. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, we provide a local & national removals service to clients in Hove and across Sussex.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals in Hove and Sussex

Mark Ratcliffe Moving - providing an exemplary moving, packing and storage service.

How can we help you today?

Removals in Hove - looking for a reliable removal company?

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving 

Moving house is one of life's big and considerably stressful events. There are so many things to remember and on top of that you have the task of trying to choose a reliable moving firm. You need to know you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning of your move will be punctual, hardworking and equipped with the right training and equipment.

Here at Mark Ratcliffe Moving we can satisfy all these important requirements. Having worked in the UK domestic removals and storage market for over 30 years, we have extensive experience working with customers throughout Hove, across the South East and nationally. Mark Ratcliffe is well respected within the moving industry and has developed a reputation for a quality service that competitors strive to achieve.

With a dedicated staff training centre, our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, wrapping and moving household furniture for home and overseas moving, as well as customer services and vehicle loading. We are fully insured and have the highest standards, competitive prices and a genuine commitment from everyone involved in your move is guaranteed when choosing Mark Ratcliffe Moving.

Our Moving Service

Unlike other removal companies, we offer a complete moving experience that takes care of every aspect of your move from start to finish. Whether you have a single piece of furniture that needs moving across town, or a 4 bedroom home whose contents need relocating up to Scotland - big or small, we can handle it all.

Following your initial enquiry, Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home (at a time convenient for you) to carry out a site survey. During this time we can discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move including any packing requirements or insurance cover for your valuable possessions. A fixed quotation can be provided for moving, storage and packing and we also offer a house clearance service that can be discussed if required. On your moving day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect your carpets, cover exposed doors and banisters etc. If requested, they will also pack and move your belongings with the utmost care and transport them safely to your new property.

Professional Packing  

Packing is time consuming and when you are relocating, time is not always something you have a lot of. That is why we offer a full packing service, whether you require complete packing or simply some of the more fragile items to be specially packed, our team are trained in packing and will ensure your possessions are well protected. If you decide to carry out your own packing, we can also provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc. All products are minimal in cost and they can be collected from our shop 

Self Storage Units  

We offer secure self storage rooms to rent for customers who prefer to deposit and remove their own goods. The self storage units are available in various sizes with our most popular size is the 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. This room is charged at £30 plus vat (per week) and with our storage rooms being much higher than local competitors and prices being over 50% less, you receive great value for money.

Removal Companies Near Me

We are proud to offer Brighton and Hove local reliable home and office removals. Whether you need assistance moving within the area or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. Our friendly and local team would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Or for ease, fill out our quote request form at the top of this page. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or we can arrange an appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers is also available.
